description: This customizable template is a perfect way to share milestones and accomplishments with customers, clients, prospects, or other business. Highlighting your goals and statistics can keep your organization top of mind and showcase your successes with a broad audience. This template could be used by a variety of organizations such as an architecture firm, educational institutions, non-profits, human resource departments, and businesses.  All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: I spend my days crafting gorgeous graphics. I work mainly with small local businesses. I’ve just spent 2 years living in Sweden. I moved back to Russia in October 2015 and am now settled in Moskow. I’m constantly learning design related topics, currently playing around a lot with flyer design for clubs and pubs.
